fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 74 incorrectly identifies when the final elements of both streams are identical, causing line 75 to erroneously remove one of the required duplicates from the merged list.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: This condition, which leads to an incorrect removal of a duplicate element, should never be true.
This branch, which incorrectly removes an element, should be unreachable.
The number of elements moved to the merged list should equal the number of elements consumed from the input lists.
The final result must contain exactly the total number of elements from both input streams.
